Container.Name: family-calendar
Container.Overview:
Shared family calendar that aggregates iCal feeds from all family members into one wall-calendar view.
Supports Google Calendar, iCloud, Outlook, and any iCal URL. Events auto-sync on a configurable per-calendar schedule (default every 4 hours). Includes month, week, rolling, and agenda views with per-person color coding.

Config.Name: Data
Config.Description: Persistent storage for the SQLite database and uploaded .ics files

Config.Name: Database Path
Config.Description: Path inside the container where the SQLite database is stored

Config.Name: Uploads Path
Config.Description: Path inside the container where uploaded .ics files are stored
